If they have this tag, don't send them the next message because that means they purchased. So we're going to copy this. And then of course you got to make sure that all the check tags, which should have done that in the other video actually, make sure all of them have the same tag. And then we're going to come over to contacts and we said Chelsea just purchased. So since she just purchased, we're going to add a tag right here, enter tag and then paste and then add. Now the next time that she's about to get a message from that campaign, it sees that she has this tag and then it automatically unsubscribes her and removes her. In other words, it, it's the same thing as if you were to press X, except it automatically does it for you. So that's what it's doing. It's basically doing this for you when you add that stop tag.
